title: invoice_invoiceitem_view Exact Working Columns
text: Use pf_TickleRight_9210.invoice_invoiceitem_view for invoice, package, expiry, member billing, and branch revenue questions. Common exact columns include invoice_id, id, invoice, date, date_string, contact_id, fullname, code_name, dropout, freeze, refund, summer_turn, batchless_link, invoice_count, fname, mname, lname, gender, gstin, member_type, class_count, code, country_code, mobile, dob, status, balance_points, batch, display_name, venue_id, avg_age, min_age, max_age, waiting_list, level_id, enrolled, limit, completed_sessions, offline, private, branch, branch_type, email, address, pincode, city, invoice_amount, invoice_tax, tax_amount, total, notes, invoice_comment, employee_id, balance, item_id, category_id, service_id, start_date, end_date, start_date_string, end_date_string, batch_id, item_amount, item_tax, item_total, sessions, session_consumed, item_discount, sessions_used, change_id, item_change, extend_reason, category, service, service_amount, module_id, topic_id, session_master_id, service_tax, duration, duration_type, batch_employee_name, batch_employee, batch_days, level, renew, item_park, bid, branch_name_actual, park, created_at, session_settled, counsellor_name, counsellor_email, senior_counsellor_name, senior_counsellor_mail. Wrong versus correct examples: contact_name is wrong, use fullname. service_name is wrong, use service. branch_name is usually wrong for this view, use branch_name_actual or branch depending on the requested output. invoice_no is usually wrong, use invoice.

title: Common Wrong To Correct Column Mapping
text: Use exact workspace column names, not guessed aliases. invoice_invoiceitem_view: contact_name -> fullname, service_name -> service, branch_name -> branch_name_actual or branch, invoice_no -> invoice, amount_paid -> not on this view, use payment or invoice_payment_view instead. session_batch_view: teacher_name -> fullname, class_name -> batch, module_name -> module. attendance_cont_view: contact_name -> fullname, venue -> recorded_venue, branch_name -> branch. contact_followup_view: contact_name -> fullname, followup_status -> status. batch_view: teacher_name -> employee. batch_employee_time_view: teacher_name -> fullname, branch_name -> branch. If a generated query uses a guessed column name, validate it before execution and repair using the exact column catalog.

title: Validation First NL To SQL Workflow
text: Recommended workflow for this workspace: retrieve business context from nl2sql-corpus.jsonl, retrieve exact view-column context from nl2sql-columns.jsonl, generate SQL, validate the SQL against docs/mysql_schema_export.txt before execution, then execute only if validation passes. For expiring packages by branch, invoice_invoiceitem_view usually needs branch_name_actual or branch, fullname, service, end_date, sessions, sessions_used, park, item_park, dropout, and freeze. Do not accept guessed columns like contact_name, service_name, or branch_name when the exact view catalog proves different names.
